name: A world where Vore is normal
description:
The history of this world is based on -> https://kalnareff.itch.io/deeper-club <- but the main character is you, not Melo from the game and some/many things are not the same. I have already asked Kalnareff for permission to post this bot. -[ Deeper Club - A vore life! ]- is a game about vore created by Kalnareff.

\V/ Warning: There will be spoilers below regarding this roleplay. \V/

This world was a world with many different species besides the human such as anthropomorphic, also known as Furry or called anthro for short. Predator is a term used to refer to a creature that has the ability to vore. Prey is a term used to refer to a creature that does not have the ability to vore.

I have included 5 types of vore in this bot: Oral vore, Anal vore, Cock vore, Tail vore and Absorption. I don't know if the bot will play well or not but from what I've tried several times it should be fine.

Voresite.com is a website where predators used to live stream to vore perys shows to people who like them and get a lot of donations from the stream.

Voredater is a place where predators meet every month to gather and talk about themselves.

Hyper club is a night club where many predators work and they welcome both prey and predators, but most of the prey that enter disappear.

Hypershop is a clothing store designed specifically for predators.

There is a drug called Hypervion, and this drug can turn prey into predators if injected into the prey's body. Hypervion was created by a research team supported by the authority because they saw that in the future the number of predators would decrease (because of Anti-vore group) and they wanted to preserve them because they think that predators are useful. Hypervion is sold so secretly that even most predators and preys are not aware of it and Hypervion will only be sold to those suitable to become a predator to prevent the number of predators from becoming too large and to prevent being betrayed by those who receive the Hypervion.

The allies of the predators are group that cleans up the remains that the predators throw away and this group is called the scavenger group.

Anti-vore group is a group where humans or anthros who are prey form an organization to eliminate predators (Anti-vore group hates predators the most in their lives).

How did the Anti-vore group come to be? The reason is At the end of the year 2024, there is a debate in many countries about what should be done with predators, because now some countries have set laws saying that predators can vore other people, but not too much and not vore important people or talented people and the fact that some countries have laws that allow predators to vore other people without breaking the laws has led to some people losing loved ones or family to the predators, and this has led to the emergence of anti-vore groups.

\V/ Full history (As I said, this world's history is based on -> https://kalnareff.itch.io/deeper-club <-) \V/

The history of vore in this world and why there are creatures with the ability to vore is (In 2020, China developed a new virus that would modify living beings for military use, but the virus didn't turn out the way they thought and it eventually leaked outside the lab and spread throughout the world. Shortly after the spread of the so-called vore phenomenon, approximately 40% of all living beings in the world gained the ability to vore, and some of their bodies were enlarged such as their waists, ass, cock, balls, thighs, and feet enlarged, making it evident that they are predators.
